Mollusca > Gastropoda > Cephalaspidea > > Aglajidae

Lined tailed-slug

Family Aglajidae

Updated May 2020

Where seen?

This tine slug with fine lines is sometimes seen on both Northern and Southern shores near seagrasses. It was previously known as Philinopsis lineolata .

Features

2-3cm. A long, cylindrical body that appears to be made up of two parts. A pair of ‘tails’, one a little longer than the other. Body with fine dark and pale horizontal lines. Flaps on the front and back of the body with bright blue and white margins.

Cyrene Reef, Feb 1 5 Photo shared by Loh Kok Sheng on his blog Identified by Toh Chay Hoon on facebook .
Cyrene Reef, Feb 16 Photo shared by Marcus Ng on facebook .
Pulau Sekudu, Oct 11 Photo shared by Lim Kok Sheng on flickr .
Changi, Apr 18 Photo shared by Abel Yeo on facebook .
